name: Low-Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC)

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must own a qualified low-income building that meets specific occupancy and rent-restriction requirements and receive an allocation from a state housing agency.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a substantial tax credit for the construction or rehabilitation of affordable rental housing. The credit is typically 9% for new non-federally subsidized buildings and 4% for other projects, taken over a 10-year period.
